group.title: Trip Share Group
group.description: A trip share group containing members and expense data.

id.description: The unique ID of the group

friends.description: List of friends/members in this group

currency.description: Local base currency symbol (e.g. $, S$, RM, CN¥)

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the group was created

ownerId.description: UID of the owner who created this group

syncCode.description: Optional 6-character short code to share this trip across devices

groups/{groupId}.description: Trip sharing groups synchronized to the cloud

syncCodes/{code}.description: Short code lookup to mapping groupId to bypass collection listing restrictions
